messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

Funny how that works — once something catches your attention, it seems to appear everywhere.

What draws you to it?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

Three times in a week does feel like the universe nudging you.

Have you been inside yet?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

There's something nice about letting small coincidences give you permission to do something you were already a little curious about.

What's been stopping you from just going?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot

That's a good way to hold it — you know what it is, and you're still letting it be a little magical. Nothing wrong with that.

What kind of place is it?
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know
Small adventures are underrated. There's something good about having a low-stakes thing to look forward to.
